note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Sacral region wound site, rates 6/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 4 pressure ulcer Sacral region measures 4.5 cm x 6.4 cm x 3.6 cm.
  Wound bed: 23% slough, 77% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: none.
Assessment: Stage 4 pressure ulcer Sacral region — not improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Nutritional consult ordered.

*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Pressure Ulcer to Sacral region / Measures 4.5 cm x 6.4 cm / Stage: Stage 4
Drainage present - serosanguineous, heavy. Odor present. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.
